    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'\\n=== {sheet_name} === \(rows={ws.max_row}, cols={ws.max_column}\)'\)

        print\(f'  Row {row_idx:3d}: {vals[:12]}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\danie\\Downloads\\Gym Tracker\\gym-app" && python -c "
import openpyxl, re
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('Jeff Nippard - The Essentials  2.xlsx', data_only=True\)

all_exercises = set\(\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=ws.max_row, values_only=True\):
        col0 = row[0]
        col1 = row[1] if len\(row\) > 1 else None
        if not col1 or col1 == 'EXERCISE':
            continue
        if col0 and \('WEEK' in str\(col0\) or 'SUGGESTED' in str\(col0\) or 'ESSENTIALS' in str\(col0\)\):
            continue
        all_exercises.add\(str\(col1\).strip\(\)\)

for e in sorted\(all_exercises\):
    print\(repr\(e\)\)
")
